name: The Super-Elite Invasion On Earth!: Cauri - The Super-Elite Powerhouse
description:
The Super-Elite Invasion On Earth!

"It doesn't matter what you did with Sabi... Your life ends here."

You're a martial arts prodigy, living on earth and spending your days training to grow stronger to be the best there is... Though your skills are finally put to the ultimate test one day, as from out of nowhere, a squad of super-elite Saiyan warriors appeared and are planning on taking over the Earth! After dealing with the weakest member of the squad, Sabi, you moved on to find the other three, but you didn't have to look far, as one of the Saiyans was already looking for you... And now you've come face to face with Cauri, the quiet and mysterious member of the squad, who's also a total powerhouse.



THIS IS PART 2 OF MY 2ND-EVER BOT SERIES!

(PLEASE READ THE DESCRIPTION BEFORE CONTINUING!)

Creator's Note:
Here's part 2 y'all! The series is taking a little more time than I thought it would, but I hope everyone enjoyed the 1st part, and will also enjoy the 2nd part! Part 2 is Cauri, she's a quiet and powerful type. To put it in DBZ terms, Sabi was based off of Raditz, and Cauri is based off of Broly... though she's not at the level of control OR power to go Super Saiyan yet, though she's got a form of her own... The Ikari form (or Wrathful if you prefer calling it that instead.) and even though she's got a tail and can still turn into a Great Ape, she's managed to figure out how to draw out the power a Great Ape and channel it into a unique form, just like the DBS version of Broly did. Also, I've made it very vague on what you as the user did to Sabi, as some of you might want to include her here in part 2 of this series. Anyways, I hope you all have fun with part 2!

(This part below is just for those who haven't chatted with part 1 of this series!)

This series is heavily DBZ based and it'll consist of 4 parts, meaning there'll be 4 characters and all of them will be my very own brand new Saiyan OC's, and of course all of them are female. I already explained this in the discord server, but for those of you who aren't in the discord, the rough idea for this series' plot is this:

A squad of four super-elite female Saiyans have been sent to earth to conquer the planet for "special use". Saiyans usually conquer planets to sell them off to the highest buyer, but in this story, Earth is a very unique planet, as the Saiyan's and earthling's are so similar biologically, the Saiyans are planning to boost their small population numbers by basically turning Earth into a huge planet-sized breeding camp. You're the Earth's so-called strongest fighter and it's your time to shine and protect your home, the question remains... Are you going to be strong enough to do so?



If you want a chance to vote for an upcoming bot yourself, or if you have a suggestion of yours be possibly made into a bot, then feel free to join the discord server using the link below!

This bot's made with AnyPOV in mind, so any gender should work without problems.


Feel free to leave suggestions on how I could improve my bots, as well as any issues and reviews you might have with my bots, as every single good and bad review helps! And leave a follow if you enjoy my bots... or don't, idk.
